title: Aberdeen Cold Snap
lead: Aberdeen is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.29. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Aberdeen are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.5 GG, indicating a substantial demand for heating. 
 The low wind speed of 1.8 km/h and humidity of 63% are exacerbating the cold conditions, making it feel even colder.
conclusion: Operators should take immediate action to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
